description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Robotoff code quality checks and unit tests that runs on push to specific paths and on pull requests to those paths. Use an ubuntu-latest job matrix with Python 3.9 and 3.10, checking out the repository, setting up Python, installing and configuring Poetry, loading cached virtual environments, installing dependencies, running linters, compiling i18n, launching tests, and uploading test coverage to Codecov and SonarCloud.
